content.text: i don't have a saturday class enrollment stored for Mira — nothing in her activity history or memory specifically ties a class to saturdays. what i do see is that she's enjoyed a parent-and-tot swim class and a library rhyme-time session in recent months, but i don't have a day of the week recorded for either. if you let me know the class name or day, i'm happy to save it so i can recall it for you going forward.
